content:
In the following figure, a grid is divided into four equal squares. We place dominoes as shown in the figure below:
\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=6cm]{https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/83425575226583858589840037019960178/90794111666261126665233350402713460128/unknown.png}
We have three types of configurations: 
1. Vertical and horizontal dominoes on top-left and bottom-right (figure (a) 
2. Vertical and horizontal dominoes on bottom-left and top-right (figure (b)
3. Vertical dominoes on top-right and bottom-left, horizontal dominoes on top-left (figure (c)
We notice that these three configurations cover half of the cells. The answer is $250,000$.

In the following figure, a grid is divided into four equal squares. We place dominoes as shown in the figure below:
\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=6cm]{https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/83425575226583858589840037019960178/90794111666261126665233350402713460128/unknown.png}
We have three types of configurations: 
1. Vertical and horizontal dominoes on top-left and bottom-right (figure (a) 
2. Vertical and horizontal dominoes on bottom-left and top-right (figure (b)
3. Vertical dominoes on top-right and bottom-left, horizontal dominoes on top-left (figure (c)
We notice that these three configurations cover half of the cells. The answer is $250,000$.
